name: Jakku
desc: Desert world. The Burning Deck cantina sits in Cratertown — a settlement built in the shadow of a crashed Separatist cruiser. This is where the crew met Maya. Campaign starting location.

name: Ajan Kloss
desc: Uncharted jungle moon. Dense canopy, bioluminescent undergrowth. The Vanishing Place — a repurposed pre-Republic temple — serves as Captain Skarn's mercenary base. Admiral Varth was held here. Campaign-critical location.

name: Takodana
desc: Lush forest world. Maz Kanata's castle on the shore of Nymeve Lake is neutral ground for pirates, smugglers, and travelers. Across the lake at Blackwind Point, Varga the Hutt runs a lawless shantytown. Campaign-critical location.

name: Endor
desc: Forest moon. Ewok homeworld. In 16 BBY, the second Death Star hasn't been conceived. But the Ebon Spire — Revan's ancient forward base — sits deep in the Dead Forest, waiting. The Moddell sector's hyperspace anomalies make the moon effectively unreachable without specific route data.

name: Bespin
desc: Gas giant. Cloud City floats in the upper atmosphere — a rough-and-tumble tibanna gas mining boomtown. In 16 BBY, Lando Calrissian has NOT yet arrived. The annual sabacc tournament at the Royal Casino draws Imperial bagmen, Hutt proxies, and the worst the Outer Rim has to offer.

name: Malpaz
desc: Scarred industrial world. The Empire buried its mistakes here — a reactor meltdown blamed on Separatist holdouts to conceal Krennic's Death Star-related projects. An Imperial research station houses drift algorithm data. The native avian population nurses a decade of resentment under occupation.

name: Eriadu
desc: Tarkin's capital. A jagged, brutalist expanse of black armor-plating and glowing red refineries. The sky is choked with exhaust from ten thousand weapons factories. Grand Moff Tarkin rules the Outer Rim from his Citadel here. In 16 BBY, Tarkin is consolidating power and pushing for the Death Star project.

name: Batuu
desc: Trading outpost on the edge of Wild Space. Black Spire Outpost serves smugglers, traders, and those who want to be forgotten. Three suns create complex light patterns over petrified spire forests. In 16 BBY, the Empire hasn't noticed this backwater yet.

name: Xala
desc: The edge of known space. Inquisitor Draco has established a stronghold here precisely because of its remoteness — no Moffs looking over his shoulder, no bureaucracy, no witnesses. The Xala-Cermau hyperlane is one of the galaxy's rarest commodities — a navigable route through Wild Space.
